ksa_text: Conduct data and AI strategy engagements, including current state assessment, future state design, gap analysis, and roadmap development with defined milestones and investment estimates.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-014 (Data Governance/Task) scores 0.475 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.475) and is edge_case for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.475), and Data Governance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NIST AI RMF signal (0.475) for this Data Governance KSA reflect actual ISO 8000 Data Technician requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at technician level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance at composite 0.475 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Technician. Final decision: include.
